action.proof_term:
intro p e q B hp hcop hbound
have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (p ^ e * q) =
    ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (p ^ e) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 q :=
  ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime (hcop.pow_left e)
rw [hmul, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp] at hbound
apply (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (by omega : 0 < e + 1)).2
simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using hbound

intro p e q B hp hcop hbound
have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (p ^ e * q) =
    ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (p ^ e) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 q :=
  ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime (hcop.pow_left e)
rw [hmul, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp] at hbound
apply (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (by omega : 0 < e + 1)).2
simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using hbound

info.lean_statement: ∀ p e q B : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → Nat.Coprime p q → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (p ^ e * q) ≤ B → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 q ≤ B / (e + 1)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
